## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Improvement to existing skill
- [ ] Bug / correction
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] Frontmatter is valid YAML
- [ ] Instructions are numbered and focused
- [ ] Code samples are real, minimal, and idiomatic
- [ ] Checklist is included at the end of the skill
- [ ] No emojis in skill content
- [ ] Links are not broken
